name: Tuna Stuffed Manicotti
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup cottage cheese (1% fat), blended smooth
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook manicotti according to package directions. Drain and cool.
2. Combine tuna, cottage cheese, parsley, onion, lemon juice, and dill weed in a bowl.
3. Stuff manicotti shells with tuna mixture and place seam side down in an 11x7-inch baking dish sprayed with non-stick cooking spray.
4. Combine sauce ingredients and spoon over manicotti.
5. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes. Serves 4, two shells each.
